context: The German chart mixed Schlager (sentimental German-language pop) with Dutch and Greek easy-listening acts and British glam rock. Udo Jurgens' 'Griechischer Wein' became one of the most iconic German-language songs, a poetic tribute to immigrant workers.

tracks.title: Ein Lied zieht hinaus in die Welt
Guitar King
tracks.artist: Hank the Knife and the Jets

tracks.title: Ich trink' auf dein Wohl, Marie
